title: Positive login flow
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Log in" button.

title: Positive sign up flow
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Sign Up" button.
expected_result: The sign up form should appear.

title: Positive Facebook login flow
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Log in with Facebook" button.
expected_result: The Facebook login dialog should appear.

title: Negative login with invalid credentials
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Log in" button. | Enter invalid email and password. | Click the "Log in" button.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating invalid credentials.

title: Negative sign up with missing fields
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Sign Up" button. | Leave all fields empty. | Click the "Sign Up" button.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating missing fields.

title: Negative Facebook login with invalid credentials
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Log in with Facebook" button. | Enter invalid credentials in the Facebook login dialog. | Click the "Log in" button.
expected_result: An error message should be displayed indicating invalid credentials.

title: Toggle state of buttons
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Log in" button. | Click on the "Sign Up" button. | Click on the "Log in with Facebook" button.
expected_result: The state of the buttons should toggle between active and inactive.

title: Button clickability
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Log in" button. | Click on the "Sign Up" button. | Click on the "Log in with Facebook" button.

title: Navigation
test_steps: Open the SurveyMini app. | Click on the "Log in" button. | Click on the "Sign Up" button. | Click on the "Log in with Facebook" button.
expected_result: The app should navigate to the respective login, sign up, or Facebook login screens.
